mcq.question: What is artificial intelligence?
mcq.correct: Simulation of intelligent behaviour by computers
wrong: Storage of large amounts of data

mcq.question: Which is a characteristic of an AI system?
Which set shows all four characteristics of an AI system?
mcq.correct: Collection of data, rules for using data, ability to reason, ability to learn and adapt
wrong: Collection of data, sensors, ability to reason, ability to learn and adapt
Rules for using data, ability to reason, ability to learn and adapt, storage of data
Collection of data, rules for using data, ability to reason, user interface

mcq.question: A system collects data and applies rules to make decisions. Which characteristic of AI is this?
A system improves its performance as it processes more data. Which characteristic of AI is this?
What does an expert system do?
mcq.correct: Simulates the decisions of a human expert
wrong: Stores all files on a network

mcq.question: Which component of an expert system stores facts?
Which component of an expert system stores rules?
What does the inference engine do?
What is the role of the interface in an expert system?
mcq.correct: Allows the user to interact with the system

mcq.question: What is machine learning?
mcq.correct: AI that learns patterns from data

mcq.question: A medical system uses a knowledge base, rule base and inference engine to suggest a diagnosis. What type of AI is this?
A program identifies patterns in data and improves over time. What type of AI is this?
Which is an example use of AI?
